title: Packet Propagation Infrastructure

module_descriptions.RGE_Packet_Location_Map.py: Class RGEPacketLocationMap. Dict-backed tracker mapping packet IDs to their current node ID. Methods: set_location, get_location (returns Optional[str]), remove. Storage only; no routing.
module_descriptions.RGE_Node_Packet_Accessor.py: Class RGENodePacketAccessor wrapping RGEFieldTopology. Provides controlled add_packet (idempotent, auto-creates missing nodes), remove_packet (safe no-op for missing entries), and get_packets (returns defensive copy). No routing.
module_descriptions.RGE_Packet_Propagator.py: Class RGEPacketPropagator. propagate(packet_id) looks up the current node from the location map, calls RGEGraphTraversal.neighbors, moves the packet to the first neighbor deterministically, and updates the location map. Raises ValueError on missing location or absent neighbors.
module_descriptions.RGE_Recursion_Field_Engine.py (modified): Added Optional[RGEPacketPropagator] propagator parameter to constructor (defaults to None). Added propagate_packet(packet_id) method that delegates to self.propagator or raises RuntimeError if none is configured. No automatic propagation loops introduced.

design_decisions: RGEPacketLocationMap.remove is idempotent — no error on unknown packet_id.
RGENodePacketAccessor.get_packets returns a defensive copy (list()) to prevent callers from mutating node.packets directly.
RGENodePacketAccessor.add_packet auto-creates missing nodes to allow bridge-free usage; idempotent on duplicate packet_id.
RGEPacketPropagator always selects neighbors[0] — deterministic, no scoring or weighting.
RGERecursionFieldEngine.propagate_packet raises RuntimeError (not ValueError) when propagator is absent — distinguishes a configuration error from a data error.
No automatic propagation loops; propagate_packet is manual-invocation only.
No scoring, resonance, or decay logic introduced.
